mano_cua.result_summary: 发现bug:长标题在模态框中不换行,单行溢出超出模态框右边界,与背景元素重叠,关闭按钮被推到屏幕边缘。标题完全忽略模态框宽度约束。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Long title 'Quickly configure the server with SSH and other standard applications' does NOT wrap in modal header. Title overflows beyond modal right boundary, overlaps with background elements. Close button pushed to far right edge.
